subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast heard the Call! Though outwardly thou art barred from hearing, yet praise be to God that the Call of the Abhá Beauty and the Voice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستمع ندآء هر چند بظاهر از استماع ممنوعی ولی الحمد لله ندآء جمال ابهی و صوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @outward and inward meanings
